level_signals: 10+ years of experience in product management, design, or engineering
at least 3+ years in a senior capacity making company-level product decisions
Expected to partner with senior leadership and lead company-wide initiatives

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in product management, design, or engineering with at least 3+ years in a senior capacity making company-level product decisions
must_haves.qualifier: at least 3+ years in a senior capacity making company-level product decisions

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong understanding of user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) principles and best practices
Technical familiarity with personalization systems, data modeling, and machine learning
Strong written and verbal communication across business, design, and engineering audiences
Demonstrated experience leading company-wide initiatives influencing technical roadmaps

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Believe that fast software is the best software
Built complex personalization systems in the past
Developed governance frameworks that balance usage and discovery
Strong (informed) point of view on how third-party apps fit into first-party experiences
Enjoy using social media to interact directly with customers for feedback

scope.surface: Stripe Dashboard — navigation, search, settings, information architecture, home page personalization, third-party developer integrations
core_responsibilities: Own the strategy and roadmap that makes the Dashboard uniquely good for any business model
Improve wayfinding mechanisms to increase user productivity and product discovery
Shape the information architecture to encourage interoperability
Develop a strategy and roadmap for a more personalized Dashboard
Write the playbook for interoperability across the numerous layers of indirection in the Dashboard
Partner with third-party developers to understand how the Dashboard can better serve their needs
Collaborate with engineering and design across time zones (PST, EST, CET)
Define and track success metrics for quality and performance
Partner with senior leadership to understand and uphold ambitions for quality at scale

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership described in detail
Role described as high-impact, company-level scope — strong career opportunity for senior PMs
Explicitly states preferred qualifications are bonuses, not requirements — inclusive of candidates who partially match
Cross-timezone collaboration signals distributed or flexible working norms
Stripe's mission and scale offer meaningful product challenges
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — unclear whether role requires relocation or office attendance
Work authorization and visa sponsorship policy not mentioned
10+ years minimum is a high bar that combined with 'staff' title may signal slow upward mobility in title
Role spans very broad surface area (navigation, search, settings, IA, personalization, third-party) — scope may be ambitious for one PM

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff PM' and 10+ years + 3+ years senior requirement)
seniority.manages_people (inferred false; no people management mentioned)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description as B2B financial infrastructure)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
ambiguities: Location and remote/hybrid policy are entirely absent from the JD — impossible to determine work arrangement requirements
The minimum experience can be in 'product management, design, or engineering' — unclear whether non-PM backgrounds (e.g., pure engineering) fully satisfy this requirement in practice
